misc.text: I honestly think that Boruto fans overrate Delta a lot. She’s strong, but I don’t think she would win a fight against prime Madara. Eida on the other hand would win against Prime Madara in less than a minute lol #BORUTO #NARUTO 𝙅𝙀𝙎𝙎𝙀 💫 (@Unariel_) How Madara would move if Kishimoto decided to revive him — https://nitter.net/Unariel_/status/2042079990041206929#m

items.text: I honestly think that Boruto fans overrate Delta a lot. She’s strong, but I don’t think she would win a fight against prime Madara. Eida on the other hand would win against Prime Madara in less than a minute lol #BORUTO #NARUTO 𝙅𝙀𝙎𝙎𝙀 💫 (@Unariel_) How Madara would move if Kishimoto decided to revive him — https://nitter.net/Unariel_/status/2042079990041206929#m
